name: claude-next-level
description: George's curated Claude Code plugins for automation, architecture, and workflow

plugins.name: grandslam-offer
plugins.description: Grand Slam Offer workshop with adversarial agent teams. Builds irresistible offers using Hormozi's $100M Offers methodology, stress-tested by marketer, strategist, and customer persona agents.

plugins.name: hundred-million-leads
plugins.description: Lead generation workshop with adversarial agent teams. Builds complete lead gen systems using Hormozi's $100M Leads methodology — lead magnets, Core Four channels, outreach scripts, and Rule of 100 execution plans, stress-tested by growth hacker, marketer, strategist, and customer persona agents.

plugins.name: cycle
plugins.description: Unified PR review system: /cycle:pr shepherds one or many PRs through review with dispatch-and-poll fix agents, worktree management, and CodeRabbit patterns.

plugins.name: ralph-wiggum-toolkit
plugins.description: Recipe-based autonomous development loops. Greenfield recipe: JTBD specs to plan to build. Port recipe: extract behavioral specs from existing codebase, port to target language. Implements Geoffrey Huntley's Ralph methodology with manifest-driven progress tracking.

plugins.name: ralph-wiggum
plugins.description: Spec-driven autonomous development loops implementing Geoffrey Huntley's Ralph methodology. Three phases: define JTBD requirements, plan implementation, build in loops. Parallel subagents, IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md as shared state, specs/* as source of truth.
plugins.deprecation_message: Replaced by ralph-wiggum-toolkit. Install ralph-wiggum-toolkit and use /ralph instead of /ralph-wiggum:*

plugins.name: jj-commands
plugins.description: Jujutsu (jj) version control workflows — replaces git commit/push/PR commands in JJ repos. Detects .jj/ directory and handles describe, push, bookmark, PR creation, conflict resolution, and undo.

plugins.name: repo-clone
plugins.description: Automates codebase porting between languages using a Ralph loop architecture. Primary context acts as scheduler, spawning subagents for spec extraction and parity checking across 6 stages: freeze, extract-tests, extract-source, plan, build, audit.
plugins.deprecation_message: Replaced by ralph-wiggum-toolkit. Install ralph-wiggum-toolkit and use /ralph init --recipe port instead of /repo-clone
